case_title: CHI IAN PAO VS. PETER ROBERT CALABRESE

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY PAO, CHI IAN CALABRESE, PETER ROBERT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-25-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-25-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,364.17 FILED BY PAO, CHI IAN AS TO DEFENDANT CALABRESE, PETER ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF REGARDING SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FROM DEFENDANT
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAO, CHI IAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALABRESE, PETER ROBERT $1,182.08 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,247.08, THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF SUFFERED $2,364.17 IN PROPERTY DAMAGE BUT WAS 50% AT FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED OCT-02-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALABRESE, PETER ROBERT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-25-2013 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CALABRESE, PETER ROBERT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAO, CHI IAN AS TO DEFENDANT CALABRESE, PETER ROBERT
